high_income_complaint.agency_name: Department of Housing Preservation and Development
high_income_complaint.resolution_description: The Department of Housing Preservation and Development conducted or attempted to conduct an inspection.  More information about inspection results can be found through HPD's website at www.nyc.gov/hpd by using HPDONLINE (enter your address on the home page) and entering your SR number under the complaint status option.

low_income_complaint.agency_name: Department of Housing Preservation and Development
low_income_complaint.resolution_description: The Department of Housing Preservation and Development inspected the following conditions. No violations were issued. The complaint has been closed.
